sharedEntities.description: Core entity representing loan data with status and attributes, shared across all components
Represents chat sessions between users and AI about specific loans, maintained in AI service but accessed via UI
Chat messages exchanged between users and AI assistant, created in AI service and displayed in UI

dataFlows.name: AI-Assisted Loan Query Flow
dataFlows.description: User queries loan information through UI, which connects to AI service for natural language processing and returns insights
steps: User submits loan query through UI (/selling/api/sessions)
UI sends request to AI service (/chat or /chat/{session_id}/message)
AI service processes question using AWS Bedrock
AI response streamed back to UI via Server-Sent Events

dataFlows.name: Loan Status Change Notification Flow
dataFlows.description: System detects loan status changes and notifies relevant stakeholders
steps: Loan status change detected in system
Event routed through Hooks Hub to subscribers
UI potentially updates based on notification

integrationPoints.description: UI sends user queries about loans to AI service and receives natural language responses
AI service streams processed responses back to UI for progressive rendering
Hooks service publishes events that may trigger UI updates through event subscriptions

patterns.description: Enables users to ask questions about loans in natural language instead of using structured search
AI responses are streamed token-by-token to improve perceived performance
System uses event publishing for real-time notifications about loan status changes
Chat sessions maintain context across multiple interactions for better user experience

ambiguities: How COS.Lending.Selling.UI subscribes to or consumes notifications from COS.Lending.Selling.Hooks is not clearly defined
The mechanism for how COS.Lending.Selling.UI fetches initial loan data before AI queries is unclear
How loan actions in cos-lending-selling-ai relate to the events published by COS.Lending.Selling.Hooks is undefined
The relationship between the LoanDetails entity in UI and the LoanAction entity in AI service is not specified
